/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libcamera_stream__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so -o libcamera_stream__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so CMakeFiles/camera_stream__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c/camera_stream/msg/detail/share_image__type_support_c.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/kevin/radar_ws/build/camera_stream:/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: libcamera_stream__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librmw.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_dynamic_typesupport.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libfastcdr.so.2.2.7 /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
